m: GT vs RCB - TATA IPL 2026 QUALIFIER 1
d: Witness a massive Qualifier 1 showdown as Shubman Gills Gujarat Titans take on defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru in a battle for a direct spot in the IPL 2026 Final. With both teams chasing what could be their second IPL title and Virat Kohli once again stepping into a high-pressure playoff night, expect explosive batting, fierce rivalries, and edge-of-the-seat moments as two powerhouse sides collide in one of the seasons biggest clashes. Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX!
